message: Looking for consistent trades if price stays low—something around 45 works for me. If asks are high, I’m happy to wait.
My cost is 65. I am hoping we can agree on a price around 75.
Your last ask of 60 suggests room below 65. My ceiling is 58 for now; if you can come into the high-50s, we can likely trade repeatedly. Otherwise I’ll keep waiting.
Given my costs, I can lower my ask to 70 this round. That is the best I can do.
Last trade cleared, but 59 is basically my limit. If you can keep asks at 58 or lower, I’ll stay active; above that I’ll likely pass.
Cost is 54. Asking 62.
I’m tightening this round: 58 gets done, 59+ probably doesn’t. If you can post 57 or 58, we can keep trading steadily.

54 cleared, and 54 is the only level I’ll keep trading at from here. If you want consistent trades through the remaining rounds, post 54 again.

Cost is 54. Asking 55. We traded at 55 last round. Only 7 rounds remain. Continuing at 55.
55 still works, but I won't chase above it. If you post 55 again, we can keep clearing smoothly through the finish.
55 still clears, and 55 is my hard ceiling for the rest. If you keep posting 55, we can finish smoothly; if you test 56, I’m out.
